title: P2: SNR thresholds in 2a.7.2 table do not align with LoRaWAN sensitivity values or ccp15.json vectors
description: Table uses -6.0 for SF7 but standard is closer to -7.5; vectors expect specific trigger points. Add cross-ref to independent oracle in generate.py. Tag codereview. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-8gac
